statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented and pushed the next Anton slice.

Changed:
- Tightened `maintenance.html` on iPhone with page-scoped `maintenance-page` styling.
- Trimmed Maintenance mobile hero chips to the primary tasks.
- Changed the mobile bottom bar to `Update / Prep / Planner / More`.
- Made Service Prep cards compact two-column at iPhone width, with tighter action rows.
- Tightened Pocket Planner controls/samples without changing vehicle facts.
- Added browser-smoke coverage for the new mobile density rules.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v274`.
- Updated Anton state/backlog/roadmap/audit notes and `ANTON.md`.

Verified:

- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v274-maintenance-density -SkipScreenshots` passed.
- Captured mobile/desktop screenshots under `debug-screenshots/audit-v274-maintenance-density-*.png`.

Committed and pushed:
